creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
> Would you mind placing the patch files somewhere for download or
 > resubmitting them to the PR as attachments? For some reason, they
 > are embedded inline in the PR, and it's easier to patch the port
 > if I have the files in their original form.

It's probably because I pgp-signed my submission. Let me try
re-attaching without signing and if that doesn't work I'll post
them somewhere.

		Craig
